content: {"project":"Orchid Landing Page","date":"2025-05-25","goal":"Comprehensively revamp all Astro landing pages to premium production-grade design with Framer Motion animations, glassmorphism cards, gradient borders, animated graphs/counters, and fix all type errors for deploy readiness","constraints":["Preserve ALL i18n functionality (en/es/pt) no hardcoded strings","Maintain component backward compatibility visual overhaul only","Use brand colors from global.css","Gradient border glow ::after technique with mask-composite trick","StatsCounter className prop pattern","Magnetic button pattern with hero-btn-magnetic class","Pre-existing type errors in ContactForm ConsultationForm CourseCatalogSection Footer InstructorGrid LucideIcon PremiumCTABanner TutorProfilePage PremiumFooter tutors are OUT OF SCOPE","Root-level metodo.astro (~9300-line Canva embed) is out of scope"],"completed":{"animation_migration":["All 14 pages migrated from CSS .reveal/.reveal.visible to React islands (MotionReveal StaggerContainer/StaggerItem MotionCard)","All emoji to Lucide migration done","PremiumHero.astro updated with visualType=animated support + magnetic button script fixed","HeroVisual.tsx created (~461 lines 3 variants: dashboard/growth/network)","StatsCounter integration on 4 pages (academic-support k12 methodology solutions)"],"i18n_and_type_fixes":["Duplicate nav key sets removed from en/es blocks in ui.ts","Contact.astro star rating fix (hardcoded 5star to 4.9)","Removed .tsx extensions from all React component imports in 11 lang page files eliminated 43 ts(5097) errors","Added ALL missing i18n keys to pt/en/es blocks in ui.ts","Fixed resources.astro Element.style errors with querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>","Fixed resources.astro PremiumCard variant mismatch added as const","Fixed index.astro TrustSignalsSection missing ratingValue=4.9 prop","Fixed t function type mismatch on 4 pages cast t as (key: string) => string","Removed all unused imports/variables"],"glassmorphism_gradient_border_cards":["team-card (about.astro) ::after gradient-border mask-composite hover-revealed","visual-card (corporate-training.astro) always-visible gradient-border ::after opacity 0.35","featured-stat (academic-support k12-global-preparation methodology) ::after gradient-border + hover micro-interaction","solutions-featured-stats container (solutions.astro) ::after gradient-border + hover","trust-indicator (PremiumHero.astro) ::after gradient-border + hover border goes transparent","StatsBanner stat-card dark/gradient themes ::after gradient-border + backdrop-filter blur(12px) + hover","FeatureShowcase feature-card default glassmorphism rgba 0.72 bg + backdrop-filter blur 14px + ::after gradient-border hover-revealed","variant-glass updated to rgba 0.55 + backdrop-filter blur(16px)","TestimonialGrid testimonial-card glassmorphism + ::after gradient-border hover-revealed + avatar hover scale 1.08","InstructorCard glassmorphism rgba bg + backdrop-filter existing ::before gradient-border preserved","PricingTier glassmorphism + ::after gradient-border tier-featured uses rgba gradient + backdrop-filter","CourseCatalogSection course-card glassmorphism + filter-btn glassmorphism + ::after gradient-border hover-revealed"],"section_header_wraps":["17 orphan SectionHeaders wrapped in MotionReveal client:visible across 7 pages: academic-support(3) k12(3) methodology(1) solutions(4) professional-development(3) contact(1) resources(2)"],"decorative_backgrounds":["CourseCatalogSection decorative bg-dots radial-gradient 32px grid opacity 0.35 + gradient orb 500px blurred circle top-right + container z-index layering"]},"key_decisions":["Pre-existing type errors are out of scope","Cast t as (key: string) => string rather than widening component prop types","Added as const to variant string literals in data arrays","Removed .tsx from imports rather than enabling allowImportingTsExtensions","Decorative non-interactive cards get always-visible gradient-border at 0.35 opacity; interactive cards get hover-revealed","Solutions page gradient-border goes on solutions-featured-stats container not individual featured-stat items","StatsBanner gradient-border on stat-card only for dark/gradient themes; light theme uses opaque white bg","InstructorCard kept existing ::before gradient-border added glassmorphism without adding ::after","PricingTier featured tier uses rgba gradient bg + backdrop-filter instead of opaque solid","CourseCatalogSection decorative elements in section-decor absolute container with pointer-events none; content container gets z-index 1","Process-step .map() callbacks that reference i for connector conditionals MUST keep the i parameter","_ratingText prefix trick does not work in Astro frontmatter destructuring","FeatureShowcase has 3 variants (default glass gradient) only default was missing glassmorphism","TestimonialGrid featured-card already had glassmorphism testimonial-card was the plain one upgraded","All 9 high-priority basic-UI items from fresh audit now semi-transparent rgba background -> backdrop-filter blur -> ::after mask-composite gradient-border revealed on hover -> borderr -> ::after mask-composite gradient-border revealed on hover -> border-color transparent on hover"}

{"build":"62 pages approximately 5 seconds zero errors zero warnings in our files","astro_check":"51 errors all pre-existing out-of-scope component errors","out_of_scope_errors":["ContactForm","ConsultationForm","CourseCatalogSection","Footer","InstructorGrid","LucideIcon","PremiumCTABanner","TutorProfilePage","PremiumFooter","tutors"],"out_of_scope_files":["Root-level metodo.astro (~9300-line Canva embed)"],"date":"2025-05-25","no_errors_introduced_byrrors_introduced_by_our_changes":true}

i18n: apps/landing/src/i18n/ui.ts (~3595 lines). Pages with gradient-border/glassmorphism: about.astro (team-card), contact.astro (MotionReveal + SectionHeader), corporate-training.astro (visual-card opacity 0.35), academic-support.astro (featured-stat + 3 SectionHeaders), k12-global-preparation.astro (featured-stat + 3 SectionHeaders), methodology.astro (featured-stat + 1 SectionHeader), solutions.astro (solutions-featured-stats + 4 SectionHeaders), professional-development.astro (MotionReveal + 3 SectionHeaders), resources.astro (2 SectionHeaders). Components: FeatureShowcase.astro (feature-card glassmorphism + gradient-border), TestimonialGrid.astro (testimonial-card glassmorphism + gradient-border + avatar hover), InstructorCard.astro (glassmorphism + existing before gradient-border preserved), PricingTier.astro (glassmorphism + gradient-border + tier-featured rgba gradient), CourseCatalogSection.astro (bg-dots + orb + course-card glassmorphism + filter-btn glassmorphism), PremiumHero.astro (trust-indicator gradient-border), StatsBanner.astro (stat-card dark/gradient gradient-border + glassmorphism). React Islands: HeroVisual.tsx (461 lines 3 variants), MotionReveal.tsx, StaggerContainer.tsx, StaggerItem.tsx, MotionCard.tsx, StatsCounter.tsx. Styles: apps/landing/src/styles/global.css (HeroVisual CSS ~200 lines)
